version: AMOS Manual Data Workflow Guide v0.1
purpose: Define the daily operating procedure for AMOS v0.3A Manual Data Alpha.
principle: The workflow must be usable before API automation. Manual data is allowed, but missing data must cap confidence.

daily_workflow.name: Open Master Index
daily_workflow.goal: Use this as the control center, not scattered files.
daily_workflow.done_when: You know whether you are updating data, reading brief, reviewing evidence, or opening stock pages.

daily_workflow.name: Open Manual Data Workbook
daily_workflow.goal: This is the latest workbook containing Manual Inputs, Generated Brief, Priority Checklist and Evidence Packet.
daily_workflow.done_when: Workbook is open on Manual Inputs.

daily_workflow.name: Update Manual Inputs
daily_workflow.goal: Update only the minimum viable fields for P0/P1 tickers.
daily_workflow.done_when: Each active ticker has no missing must-have fields unless action cap is accepted.

daily_workflow.name: Check Priority Checklist
daily_workflow.goal: Let missing must-have fields cap confidence and action.
daily_workflow.done_when: Every ticker has a confidence cap and action cap.

daily_workflow.name: Add Evidence Packet
daily_workflow.goal: Convert observations/news/blogger views/earnings conclusions into scored evidence.
daily_workflow.done_when: Every actionable claim has counter-evidence and invalidation.

daily_workflow.name: Read Generated Brief
daily_workflow.goal: Read the AMOS daily output before touching trades.
daily_workflow.done_when: You know the daily Attack/Build/Hold/Trim Watch/Wait buckets.

daily_workflow.name: Use Peer Map for Migration
daily_workflow.goal: For AI optical/connectivity decisions, compare CRDO/LITE/COHR/NVDA/AVGO/ANET before rotating.
daily_workflow.done_when: Migration has a trigger, confirmation and do-not-migrate condition.

daily_workflow.name: Open Stock Page / Gann Auto Page
daily_workflow.goal: Open ticker page only after daily brief and peer map.
daily_workflow.done_when: Action has evidence, counter-evidence, invalidation and position role.

allowed_when: Data Freshness is Fresh or high-quality Partial
RS vs QQQ and RS vs peers are improving
Action cap at least Build/Hold Only
Panic maturity or trend continuation is valid
forbidden_when: Risk Stack high and still rising

no_trade_rules: Headline dip is not panic maturity.
Do not turn failed swing into core.
Do not let one blogger/source override data.
If data freshness is Missing, no aggressive action.
weekend_workflow: Review which tickers deserve P0/P1/P2 priority.
Clean watchlist to avoid attention dilution.
next: Generate Daily Brief HTML from workbook snapshot
Add Peer Map link into CRDO full page
